Report Issue

HelpNetra – Right Help. Right Place. Right Time.

Connecting citizens, NGOs, government, and volunteers for faster community impact.

Report Issue
View Dashboard

The 5-Step Impact Workflow

From initial reporting to final resolution, we streamline community problem-solving through smart coordination.

01
Report

Citizens submit detailed reports of community issues via our secure platform.

02
Analyze

Our system uses AI to categorize and validate reports for accuracy and urgency.

03
Prioritize

Issues are ranked by severity and location to ensure the most critical needs are first.

04
Assign

NGOs and government agencies are matched with the most suitable volunteer teams.

05
Complete

Tasks are closed and impact is tracked in real-time for continuous improvement.

Key Features

Smart Prioritization

Our system analyzes issue severity and location to ensure the most critical needs are addressed first.

Volunteer Matching

Connect citizens with the right volunteers based on skills and availability for maximum efficiency.

Real-time Tracking

Monitor every task from reporting to completion with live updates across all community regions.

Multi-user Coordination

Unified dashboard for NGOs and government to manage complex social impact projects seamlessly.

How HelpNetra Works

A streamlined workflow designed for rapid community impact through smart coordination.

01

Report Issue

Citizens submit detailed reports via our secure platform, categorizing issues by urgency and location.

Report Issue

02

System Analysis

Our AI-driven engine analyzes data patterns to identify systemic risks and prioritize high-impact interventions.

View Analysis

03

Strategic Prioritization

NGOs and government agencies view a centralized dashboard to review priority tags and task status.

View Dashboard

04

Volunteer Matching

Volunteers are automatically matched based on skills and availability to ensure the right help is assigned.

Assign Task

05

Task Completion

Tasks are marked as completed, and impact is tracked in real-time to measure community progress.
